data.executiveSummary: The frontend-web service is currently experiencing high CPU usage, with usage levels reaching 98.21%. However, there are no errors or exceptions detected in the logs, and the error rate remains at 0.00%.

rootCause.title: High CPU Usage
rootCause.description: The service frontend-web is undergoing significant CPU strain as indicated by both the real-time CPU usage and the 30-minute average metrics. This is likely impacting performance, although there are no accompanying error logs to suggest a specific application failure.

evidenceChain: Prometheus data shows CPU usage at 98.21% with an average of 94.22% over the last 30 minutes.
Loki logs show no exceptions or errors.

timeline.event: Prometheus data indicates a 30-minute average CPU usage of 94.22%.
Memory usage averages 70.31% with no errors logged.

data.impact: Potentially degraded performance due to high CPU usage but no direct errors affecting end-users.
recommendedActions: Investigate the source of high CPU usage, potentially involving code profiling or checking for infinite loops or inefficient operations.
Consider deploying additional resources or load balancing to redistribute CPU usage across multiple instances if necessary.
